scripts.render:examples: tsx scripts/render-deck.jsx examples/component-decks/ai-ops-review.jsx output/examples/ai-ops-review/ppt/index.html && tsx scripts/render-deck.jsx examples/component-decks/climate-field-report.jsx output/examples/climate-field-report/ppt/index.html && tsx scripts/render-deck.jsx examples/component-decks/retail-launch-brief.jsx output/examples/retail-launch-brief/ppt/index.html
scripts.test: npm run render:demo && npm run validate:swiss -- output/component-demo/ppt/index.html
